# AcneSafeCheck

> AcneSafeCheck is a free web tool that checks any skincare or makeup ingredient list (INCI) for comedogenic (pore-clogging) ingredients. Paste a product's ingredients and it flags each one on the 0–5 comedogenicity scale, separating pore-clogging risks from acne-safe ingredients. It runs against a database of 560+ ingredients, requires no signup, and works entirely in the browser.

## What it answers
- "Is this product acne safe?" — paste the ingredient list to find out.
- "Which ingredients clog pores / are comedogenic?" — each recognised ingredient is rated 0 (non-comedogenic) to 5 (highly pore-clogging).
- "Is [ingredient] comedogenic?" — look it up in the searchable ingredients list.

## The comedogenic scale (0–5)
- 0 = non-comedogenic (acne safe), e.g. squalane, glycerin, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, hemp seed oil, argan oil.
- 1–2 = low risk, e.g. jojoba oil, olive oil, cetyl alcohol, dimethicone.
- 3–5 = pore-clogging risk, e.g. isopropyl myristate (5), coconut oil (4), cocoa butter (4), algae extract (5), lauric acid (4), acetylated lanolin (4), myristyl myristate (5), wheat germ oil (5), certain D&C red dyes (3).

Note: a comedogenic rating is general guidance compiled from widely-used reference lists, not a lab result for every formula. Actual effects depend on the ingredient's concentration, the full formulation, and the individual's skin. The tool is informational and not medical advice.

## Key pages
- Home / acne safe ingredient checker: https://acnesafecheck.com/
- Comedogenic ingredient checker (rate a full INCI list 0–5): https://acnesafecheck.com/comedogenic-ingredient-checker.html
- Pore-clogging ingredient checker (flag breakout triggers): https://acnesafecheck.com/pore-clogging-ingredient-checker.html
- Comedogenic ingredients list (searchable 560+ ingredient database): https://acnesafecheck.com/comedogenic-ingredients-list.html

## About
AcneSafeCheck is an independent, free informational tool for people with acne-prone or breakout-prone skin who want to vet skincare and makeup products before buying. Contact: via the website.
